result.summary: Found 1 major issue: navigation text is being truncated, preventing users from seeing the complete tab label.

issues.description: The 'Hot Gam...' navigation tab text is truncated and incomplete. Users cannot see the full tab name without additional interaction.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the navigation tabs have sufficient width to display complete text, or implement proper responsive design with text wrapping/ellipsis. Consider adjusting font size, tab spacing, or using abbreviations that are clearly understandable.
